rows.label: qev025604_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh... Christopher... What's
got you so worked up?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0002
rows.name:
If there's someone you don't like,
I'll go bash 'em in for you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Hm? What do you want? If
you keep staring like that,
I'll beat you up, got it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0004
rows.name:
What were you talking
about with Christopher?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0005
rows.name:
You seemed awfully buddy-buddy...
What, are you a friend of his?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0006
rows.name:
I've confessed to you so many
times already... Why do you
always dodge the issue?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0007
rows.name:
Is that your aesthetic? Please
don't make me suffer any more...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Hm? Do you need something from me? Sorry, but
can it wait till later? I don't have the mental
space to think about anything else right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0009
rows.name:
We got a bit off track, but a love
letter might not be a bad idea![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0010
rows.name:
Either a Red Thallus Antenna from a Thallus
under the Big Arch, or an Elemental Cluster
that those alien guard robots drop sometimes...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'm still torn on which one to go with...
I want to decide by seeing the actual
items, so please bring me both.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0012
rows.name:
I finally finished writing the love letter.
Hehe... It's my first time writing a letter
like this, so I struggled quite a bit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0013
rows.name:
...As for the present, I couldn't decide
which one to go with after all, so just
hand me whichever one you think is best.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0014
rows.name:
It's kind of lumpy and doesn't really stand
out, but... Christopher said he needed to
repair his Doll named Aphro-something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0015
rows.name:
I'm sure he'll be happy with this,
right? Alright! I'll go give this
to him along with the love letter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0016
rows.name:
Please return once the "Love" has subsided.
I need to collect the data, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0017
rows.name:
Yeah, yeah. Alright, I'm off!
Wait right here and look
forward to some good news![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0018
rows.name: Hehe...! Yeeeeaaaaaahhhhh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0019
rows.name:
Th-... this is! An unbelievable numerical
value has appeared! Just what in the
world is happening to this person?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0020
rows.name:
Hey, listen to this! Christopher...
He said he'll go out with me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0021
rows.name:
He was repairing his Doll, and
apparently the part I brought was
the exact piece he was missing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0022
rows.name:
He said the fact that I coincidentally
brought it made him feel the destiny
of the God of Aesthetics![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0023
rows.name:
A-Aah! This value is... It's off the
charts of my observation device...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0024
rows.name:
This is all thanks to you
guys! Hehe, I love everyone!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Aaah! My observation device
has broken! Is this "Love"...?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0026
rows.name:
To harbor such energy within the body, Earthlings
truly are tremendous creatures, aren't they. Do you
have this kind of emotion within you as well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025604_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say that you also have deep
affection inside you.

rows.label: qev025604_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025604_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say that affection doesn't
exist within you.

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0027
rows.name:
Splendid, isn't it! If this energy
could be harnessed usefully,
wouldn't anything be possible?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0028
rows.name:
Hmmm... Earthlings really are
fascinating creatures, aren't they.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0029
rows.name:
It seems you are quite different
from this person, aren't you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0030
rows.name:
Dana-san with her "Love" and you
without your "Love"... Hmmm... That
is quite interesting, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0031
rows.name:
We've collected some very meaningful data, haven't
we. Based on this data, I will understand Earthlings
and someday master this "reading the room" concept![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0032
rows.name:
Here, this is your compensation for acting
as my hands and feet up until now. Please
accept it without hesitation, won't you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0033
rows.name:
You brought something amazing,
didn't you! Wow, a necklace made
from this would look totally wild.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0034
rows.name:
Hanging this around your neck, any
rough-looking guy... no, even an evil
spirit would turn tail and run![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0035
rows.name:
I'm sure Christopher will love it
too. Alright! I'll go give this to
him along with the love letter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0036
rows.name:
Please return once the "Love" has subsided.
I need to collect the data, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0037
rows.name:
Yeah, yeah. Alright, I'm off!
Wait right here and look
forward to some good news![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0038
rows.name: Ugh... Ah... Why...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0039
rows.name:
What is the matter? Her state of
"Sorrow" is maxed out, isn't it.
Wasn't her "Love" sorted out?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0040
rows.name:
Sorted out... Aaaah! Yeah, it
got spectacularly sorted out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0041
rows.name:
That bastard Christopher, he suddenly got
mad the moment he saw the present, and tore
up my love letter right on the spot...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0042
rows.name:
Ugh... Uuuugh...! What
exactly did I do wrong?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0043
rows.name:
This is a disaster! An abnormal level
of "Sorrow" is occurring, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0044
rows.name:
Um... is she going to be alright? At
this rate, won't she be swallowed by
this vortex of emotion and die?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_JNK0030
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025604_SEL0031
rows.name:
Explain that every Earthling
experiences this at some point.

rows.label: qev025604_JNK0040
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025604_SEL0041
rows.name:
Look at the heartbroken Dana and say
you can't deny that possibility.

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0045
rows.name:
Have you experienced such an
abnormal state yourself as well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0046
rows.name:
Hmmm... Earthlings are incredibly
resilient creatures, aren't they.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0047
rows.name:
At times like this, are you also
exposed to the danger of death?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0048
rows.name:
Hmmm... Earthlings truly are creatures
holding something akin to a bomb
inside their bodies, aren't they.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0049
rows.name:
At any rate, we've gathered the data on "Love," haven't
we. There are still incomprehensible aspects, but once
I analyze it, I should be able to understand it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0050
rows.name:
Here, this is your compensation for acting
as my hands and feet up until now. Please
accept it without hesitation, won't you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0051
rows.name:
Christopher hates me... Aah...
Why did it turn out like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0052
rows.name:
It seems Dana-san won't be escaping
this state anytime soon, does it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025604_MSG0053
rows.name:
Hmmm... Should I perhaps give her
a wristwatch like Pollen-san to
lower her "Sorrow" value, I wonder?[ST:wait ]
